generated_oml:
// Sensing Components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures motor internal current I_M from the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentIMDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encodes motor shaft angle at the motor side."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encodes gearbox output shaft angle using a secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance PoseOutputSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Transmits overall axis pose via MQTT from the gearbox output."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PoseDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueComputationComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Computes motor torque τ from current and voltage signals in the data shadow."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocityComputationComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derives angular velocity ω from time‑stamped angle data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationComputationComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Computes angular acceleration from velocity changes in the data shadow."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// Data Transmitted Instances
instance CurrentIMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance PoseDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PoseOutputSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueComputationComponent
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocityComputationComponent
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationComputationComponent
]

// Data Instances
instance CurrentIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor current I_M values received over MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentIMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor shaft angle from the motor encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped gearbox output shaft angle from the secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance PoseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped overall axis pose transmitted by the pose sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PoseDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque τ computed from current and voltage."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalculationEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity ω calculated from angle differences."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalculationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration computed from velocity changes."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalculationEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real‑time streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService, DataComparisonService
]

instance DataCalculationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data calculation module for derived quantities and friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance SimulinkModelerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for execution of motor, gearbox, and friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataComparisonService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard component displaying real‑time visualization of model and data."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing standardized asset description for the robot axis."
]

// Models
instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor for simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelerEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink gearbox model representing gear transmission to the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelerEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑viscous friction model used in the digital twin for static and dynamic friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalculationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model capturing velocity‑dependent friction in the twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalculationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model applied during continuous multi‑physics friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalculationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used to represent complex friction behavior in the twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCalculationEnabler
]

// Services
instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard displaying live motor data and simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi‑physics friction identification using integrated white‑ and black‑box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelSelectionInsight
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated comparison of simulated and measured data to refine robot control models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementInsight
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that delivers updated friction parameters to the control system."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlParametersAction
]

// Insights
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into quantified static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters identified by the twin."
]

instance FrictionModelSelectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight selecting the most suitable friction model based on identification results."
]

instance ModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing recommendations for future model refinement and maintenance planning."
]

// Actions
instance UpdateControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update control parameters with newly identified friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time continuous operation, with data streamed synchronously to the robot’s control cycle (milliseconds to seconds); simulation models executed in real time, data refreshed via MQTT at each control tick."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single digital shadow orchestration that integrates data traces, simulation and data‑calculation models, and a processing component that consumes sensor data, produces simulated outputs, and aggregates results for visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage – the shadow represents the robot during live operation, capturing real measurements rather than idealized design or manufacturing data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of data points via originates‑from links; continuous multi‑physics awareness; comparison of measured versus simulated behavior; use of white‑box and black‑box friction models; validation against live operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data; Asset Administration Shells for exposing asset data and providing a standardized interface."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML for modeling; Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per ISA‑95/Industrial Internet reference architecture; MQTT as industry‑standard messaging protocol."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Passive digital shadow with no direct actuation; cybersecurity and safety details not explicitly discussed in the document."
]
